title: Create: Crafts & (More) Additions
description: Silver Ore, proper Electrum recipe, and more content for Create Crafts & Additions.
body:
About

This is an addon for Create Crafts & Additions and Create. It adds new blocks, items, tools, and many other features.

Content

Silver Ore: Used to craft Electrum and other items. Can be found at the same layers as Gold

Electrum tools, weapon and armor set: A middle ground between Iron and Diamond equipment 

Silver and Electrum Jewels: Obtained by sanding ingots. Used in many new recipes

Craftable Totem Of Undying using Create's assembly line

Dozens of new decorative silver-based and electrum-based blocks

Many other features to discover!

Screenshots

Compatibility

Tinker's Construct / Hephaestus

Show spoiler

Create: Enchantment Industry

Show spoiler

Dependencies

Requires both Create and Create Crafts & Additions for all of the features to work.

JEI is recommended for recipes but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
